error_signature: Task request timed out after 60 seconds
title: Task request timeout in n8n
symptom: The n8n task request fails with a timeout error after 60 seconds, even for basic nodes.
not_this_if: Timeout occurs only for specific complex workflows
root_cause: The task runner process may become unresponsive or stuck, leading to timeouts for task requests. This can happen due to resource constraints or issues within the task runner container.
fix_steps: Restart the task runner container using `docker restart n8n-task-runner`
Set the environment variable `N8N_RUNNERS_TASK_TIMEOUT=120` to increase the timeout limit
agent_instruction: Restart the task runner container and adjust the timeout setting to prevent future timeouts.
